text.title: Content Attribution Model Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether content-attribution-model applies. Root question is a concrete observable; branches name a specific input pattern (`when`) and conclude with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the portfolio measured against a single conversion event with ≥90 days of UTM-tagged data?

branch.when: yes AND attribution window not pinned
yes AND ranking lacks numeric anchors

example.description: When the root condition holds and the first matching branch fires, the tree concludes with the referenced rule id — meaning the methodology applies via that rule. The agent loads the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follows it. When the root condition does not hold, the tree concludes with `skip-methodology`.
